title: Biology — Mendelian Genetics
description: Hardy–Weinberg, Punnett overview table, inheritance flowchart.

blocks.title: Genotype frequencies
blocks.markdown:
| Genotype | Frequency |
|----------|----------|
| AA | p^2 |
| Aa | 2pq |
| aa | q^2 |

blocks.title: H-W assumptions
blocks.markdown:
| Assumption | Meaning |
|------------|--------|
| No selection | Equal fitness |
| No mutation | Alleles fixed |
| No migration | Closed pop. |
| Random mating | No assortment |
| Large N | No drift |

blocks.title: Monohybrid cross
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  A[Parental genotypes] --> B[Gametes]
  B --> C[Punnett square]
  C --> D[Offspring ratios]
  D --> E[Phenotype map]
